description: One of the goals with muzzle training is to create a positive conditioned emotional response. In other words: dog sees muzzle, dog says 😍😍😍 We want your dog to feel GOOD about the muzzle game! I think Zelda here feels pretty dang good about her muzzle. What do y’all think? 😉
